'''javate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualifyingly|qualifyingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualifyingly|qualifyingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| javate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:javate|javate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:javatesher|javatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javatesherĂ«m|javatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:javatero|javatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:javateshĂ«|javateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javateshĂ«m|javateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijavatero|gokijavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijavateshĂ«|gokijavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavateshĂ«m|gokijavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojavankerom|gojavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojavankeshĂ«|gojavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavankeshĂ«m|gojavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojavankeya|gojavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:javaterom|javaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javatemu|javatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:javateya|javateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijavaterom|gokijavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavatemu|gokijavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijavateya|gokijavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:javavate|javavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:javavatesher|javavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javavatesherĂ«m|javavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:javavatero|javavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:javavateshĂ«|javavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javavateshĂ«m|javavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijavavatero|gokijavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijavavateshĂ«|gokijavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavavateshĂ«m|gokijavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojavavankerom|gojavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojavavankeshĂ«|gojavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojavavankeshĂ«m|gojavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojavavankeya|gojavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:javavaterom|javavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:javavatemu|javavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:javavateya|javavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijavavaterom|gokijavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijavavatemu|gokijavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijavavateya|gokijavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠte|jĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠtesher|jĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠtero|jĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠvĂŠtero|gokijĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠterom|jĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠtemu|jĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠvĂŠteya|jĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠvĂŠterom|gokijĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠvĂŠteya|gokijĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafvafte|jafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafvaftesher|jafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafvaftesherĂ«m|jafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafvaftero|jafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafvafteshĂ«|jafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafvafteshĂ«m|jafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafvaftero|gokijafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafvafteshĂ«|gokijafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafvafteshĂ«m|gokijafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafvafnkerom|gojafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafvafnkeshĂ«|gojafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafvafnkeshĂ«m|gojafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafvafnkeya|gojafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafvafterom|jafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafvaftemu|jafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafvafteya|jafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafvafterom|gokijafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafvaftemu|gokijafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafvafteya|gokijafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
